since_last: 50% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.49%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.63% · Gold +1.05% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 50% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.49%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.49%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRNC is the standout at +5.13%
cards.body: Leaders: CRNC +5.13%, AMAT +4.70%, TER +4.67%, LSCC +4.54%, LRCX +4.46%. Laggards: CRM -4.10%, NOW -4.02%, IBM -3.74%, EQIX -3.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.71% at $149.36
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.71% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
